calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-14-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Sofya O. Vasilyeva.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kambrie L. Keith, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express National Bank, Successor by Merger to American Express Bank, FSB.
Raquel Hernandez, Assistant Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Keith and Ms. Hernandez appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Sofya O. Vasilyeva.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts, Open Book Account, Quantum Meruit and Account Stated was filed February 27, 2019.
Defendant Sofya O. Vasilyeva's Answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 21, 2019.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial served on September 30, 2019, setting trial for February 18, 2020.
Order Deeming Matter Admitted and for Monetary Sanctions was filed on November 13, 2019.
Order to Show Cause re: Dismissal/Notice of Settlement, was served on February 18, 2020.
Plaintiff's At-Issue Memorandum was filed on October 28, 2020.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on January 27, 2021, setting trial for June 1, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 18, 2021.
On June 1, 2021, Department 206 assigned this matter to Department 514 for Prove-Up Hearing on June 14, 2021.

Plaintiff American Express National Bank, Successor by Merger to American Express Bank, FSB, submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Pages 2 through 19 of the Card Member Agreement............................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Defendant's Final Account Statement........................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff American Express National Bank, Successor by Merger to American Express Bank, FSB, and against defendant Sofya O. Vasilyeva, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $5,500.19.
Costs - $516.93.
Total - $6,017.12.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Off Calendar Nov-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Henry Yandell of Michael & Associates 805-379-8505 CourtCall appearance for plaintiff. No other appearances.

Hearing Held - The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK's Motion To Deem Matters Admitted And For Monetary Sanctions Notice Of Submission On Plaintiffs Motion To Deem Matters Admitted. The Motion is granted. The Requests for Admissions propounded upon Defendant, Sofya Vasilyeva are deemed admitted; Defendant. Sofya Vasilyeva, shall pay monetary sanction to the moving party in the sum of $360.00 Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Thomas Cohen, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)
